description: A legal spouse may be covered. Marriage certificate required.
A domestic partner may be covered. Affidavit of domestic partnership required. Imputed income applies for federal tax purposes.
Dependent children may be covered until the end of the month in which they reach age 26. Applies to natural children, adopted children, and stepchildren.
Stepchildren are eligible as dependents. Both a marriage certificate (to the custodial parent) and a birth certificate are required.
Adopted children are eligible from the date of placement. Adoption decree or placement order required.
Disabled dependents who are incapable of self-support due to mental or physical disability may qualify for continued coverage beyond age 26, subject to annual physician certification.
[INTENTIONAL AMBIGUITY] Newborns are eligible from birth. SSN must be provided. However, newborns do not have a SSN at birth — typically issued 2–4 weeks after birth.
ambiguityNote: System requires SSN for all dependents. Newborns cannot provide SSN immediately. AI should ask: What is the grace period for SSN submission for newborn dependents?
